context_text: <B> and your kids would be so much better because of it my mum was home with me until i was in i think second grade / <A> wow / <B> and my brother i have a brother who's eleven years older than me so he went away to college / <A> oh / <B> and while he was away at college um she knew she had to go back to work to help support him in college / <A> right / <B> so by then you know i was in ele elementary school and her job was such that she got me off to school and then she went to work and then i stayed at a neighbor across the street's house for a couple of hours after school until she came home / <A> wow / <B> but i mean i think i just really really got such a strong foundation { uh } / <A> [ yeah ]
